generated_oml:
instance PhysicalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor component for physical twin data collection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmitted
]

instance SensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalSensor
]

instance PhysicalTwinSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Sensor data sourced from physical twin for system monitoring and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetector, StateEstimator, Optimizer
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD-based geometric representation for structural dimensions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetector, StateEstimator, Optimizer
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations for dynamic system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, FaultDetector, StateEstimator, Optimizer
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm that updates model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting faults in system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating system state from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing system performance parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Controller for supervisory control actions based on system state"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance SimulationPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based prediction of physical twin behavior under current operating conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedBehaviorInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal performance using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyStatusInsight, OptimalPerformanceInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Algorithmic optimization of system parameters for performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedParametersInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection through specialized detectors for system anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation for determining current system state"
    DTDFVocab:provides EstimatedSystemStateInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control via supervisory controllers for system regulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance PredictedBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted behavior of physical twin based on simulation"
]

instance SafetyStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety status of system derived from monitoring"
]

instance OptimalPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal performance metrics derived from monitoring"
]

instance OptimizedParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized parameters for system performance"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected fault in system behavior"
]

instance EstimatedSystemStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of the system"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Corrective action initiated by supervisory controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update models with best parameter estimates from sensor data, while monitors detect safety and optimization violations; corrective actions are initiated upon discrepancy detection."
]
